questions.question: Define logical time and explain its relevance to distributed systems. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A brief explanation of logical time and its importance in distributed systems

questions.question: Compare and contrast logical clocks and real clocks in the context of distributed systems. (10 marks)
questions.hint: A detailed explanation of the differences and similarities between logical clocks and real clocks in distributed systems

questions.question: Suppose you are implementing a logical clock in a distributed system. How would you ensure that all nodes agree on the clock value, and what methods would you use to resolve any discrepancies? (10 marks)
questions.hint: A detailed explanation of the methods to ensure clock agreement and resolve discrepancies in a logical clock implementation
